block_01: What is better: trading or investing? Deciding on an approach, it is important to weigh all of the pros and cons of each method.
block_02: Traders make a large number of deals and focus on short timeframes in order to gain the highest possible profits as soon as possible. This approach doesn’t require a substantial start-up capital, but it is associated with high volatility and higher risks. Investors normally choose more stable conditions to enter the market, but make higher investments and wait for returns much longer.
block_03: Learn more about the differences and similarities of traders and investors and create your own unique strategy that works best for you.
